name: property managers handling 10-20 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inefficient reporting causes delayed insights on property performance. We automate reporting instead of manual spreadsheets and email updates.
problem_solved: Inefficient reporting processes lead to delayed insights on property performance.
